title: Amtech - COB Mini Worklight with Clip for Home DIY, Workshops, and Outdoor Activities, Super Bright with 2 Lighting Modes, 360 Rotation, Cordless and Portable, Rechargeable (5W)
availability_text: Only 12 left in stock (more on the way).
features: SUPER BRIGHT: The powerful COB light (520 lumen) reaches a distance of 10m for optimal light coverage, making it ideal for home DIY, workshops, and outdoor activities. It’s a must-have for professionals and DIYers alike!

PORTABLE: The lightweight worklight is cordless for added convenience, and can be easily carried around and stored in toolboxes. It also features a clamp for effortless attachment and hands-free DIY. Rechargeable with the included USB lead and runs up to 3 hours when fully charged.
FLEXIBLE: The worklight features two lighting modes for any situation (100% and 50%). It can also be rotated 360 so that you can direct the beam exactly where you need it.
3 YEAR WARRANTY: We work hard to make sure our tools are reliable for any task. That’s why all our hand tools are backed by a three year product replacement warranty.
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: Product Description The COB light is super bright with a lumen of 520, and the beam reaches 10m for optimal light coverage. Powered by a USB charging lead, it runs for up to 3 hours after charging. The lightweight and cordless worklight can be easily carried around for DIY projects around the home, in workspaces, or for outdoor adventures. It also includes a clamp for hassle-free attachment. There are two lighting options (50% and 100%), and the light can rotate 360𐩑 so you can direct it exactly where you need it.
